metadata.description: Maps each deduplicated threat to its discovering Phase B specialists for confidence analysis

TECH-H001.title: closeMarket Underflow: availableLiquidity -= normalizedAmountPaid Uses Raw Subtraction Instead of satSub
TECH-H001.duplicate_group_description: closeMarket arithmetic underflow when availableLiquidity -= normalizedAmountPaid uses raw subtraction instead of satSub, caused by rounding mismatch between scaleAmount (rayDiv, rounds to nearest) and mulDiv (rounds down) in _applyWithdrawalBatchPayment when scaleFactor >= 2*RAY

TECH-H002.title: closeMarket Rounding Dust in scaledPendingWithdrawals Prevents Market Closure
TECH-H002.duplicate_group_description: closeMarket reverts due to non-zero rounding dust in scaledPendingWithdrawals after processing all batches, because scaleAmount(normalizeAmount(x)) < x leaves irrecoverable 1-wei dust

TECH-H003.title: closeMarket Loop Repeatedly Processes Same Unpaid Batch Without Progress
TECH-H003.duplicate_group_description: closeMarket loop repeatedly processes the same first unpaid batch without queue progress because _processUnpaidWithdrawalBatch always reads first() and only removes on full payment

ECON-H006.title: Unpaid Withdrawal Batch Array Growth Enables Gas-Limit DoS on closeMarket
ECON-H006.duplicate_group_description: Unbounded unpaidBatches array growth enables block gas limit DoS on closeMarket via repeated small withdrawal queuing with short withdrawalBatchDuration

ECON-H001.title: onSetAnnualInterestAndReserveRatioBips Hook Always Reverts Due to Pre-Call RETURNDATASIZE Check
ECON-H001.duplicate_group_description: onSetAnnualInterestAndReserveRatioBips always reverts due to Yul evaluation order: or(lt(returndatasize(),0x40), iszero(call(...))) evaluates returndatasize() before the call executes, reading stale 32-byte returndata from prior balanceOf

TECH-H005.title: onBorrow Hook Uses Wrong Size Constant (RepayHook_Base_Size Instead of BorrowHook_Base_Size)
TECH-H005.duplicate_group_description: onBorrow hook assembly uses RepayHook_Base_Size instead of BorrowHook_Base_Size for calldata sizing (latent copy-paste error, both currently equal 0x0224)

TECH-H006.title: pushProtocolFeeBipsUpdates Reverts Entirely If Any Market in Range Is Closed or Has Unchanged Fees
TECH-H006.duplicate_group_description: pushProtocolFeeBipsUpdates reverts entire batch if any single market is closed or already has the target fee, due to assembly call with no error handling

TECH-H007.title: withdrawableProtocolFees Arithmetic Underflow When Market Is Underfunded
TECH-H007.duplicate_group_description: withdrawableProtocolFees arithmetic underflow (panic) when totalAssets < normalizedUnclaimedWithdrawals during severe delinquency, blocking collectFees

TECH-H010.title: Deposit Amount Credited Without Verifying Actual Received Amount (Fee-on-Transfer Token Inflation)
TECH-H010.duplicate_group_description: Fee-on-transfer token inflates internal accounting because deposit/repay credit scaledAmount based on input amount without verifying actual received balance delta

TECH-H012.title: Withdrawal execution can revert via division-by-zero when `batch.scaledTotalAmount == 0`, potentially blocking withdrawals for a given expiry
TECH-H012.duplicate_group_description: executeWithdrawal division-by-zero revert when called with expiry that has no batch (batch.scaledTotalAmount == 0), as mulDiv has no explicit zero-divisor guard

ECON-H010.title: setAnnualInterestAndReserveRatioBips Reserve Ratio Check Uses Stale State for annualInterestBips During Decrease Validation
ECON-H010.duplicate_group_description: Hooks contract can silently override borrower's requested annualInterestBips and reserveRatioBips in setAnnualInterestAndReserveRatioBips, only bounded by > BIP check

ECON-H017.title: Permanent Lock of Withdrawal Dust via Pro-Rata Rounding
ECON-H017.duplicate_group_description: Pro-rata withdrawal rounding dust from mulDiv rounds-down permanently locks small amounts in normalizedUnclaimedWithdrawals, accumulating over market lifetime

OPS-H014.title: TransientBytesArray storage encoding/decoding mismatch or panic path can brick HooksFactory.getMarketParameters during market deployment flows
OPS-H014.duplicate_group_description: TransientBytesArray decoding can revert with Panic_InvalidStorageByteArray during market deployment if transient storage encoding is corrupted or malformed

OPS-H015.title: HooksFactory._deployHooksInstance uses extcodesize-1 / extcodecopy starting at offset 1: malformed template code can cause unexpected initcode and unsafe deployments
OPS-H015.duplicate_group_description: HooksFactory template deployment copies code with extcodecopy offset 1 and size-1, assuming stored-initcode format; malformed template produces invalid initcode

ECON2-H009.title: normalizedUnclaimedWithdrawals Over-Reservation via scaleAmount Rounding in Batch Payments
ECON2-H009.duplicate_group_description: normalizedUnclaimedWithdrawals progressively over-reserved via scaleAmount rounding in _applyWithdrawalBatchPayment where normalizedAmountPaid exceeds input availableLiquidity

ECON2-H010.title: transferFrom Allowance Consumed by Requested Amount, Not Actual Scaled Transfer Value
ECON2-H010.duplicate_group_description: transferFrom reduces allowance by user-specified amount but actual value transferred is normalizeAmount(scaleAmount(amount)) which may differ due to rounding

TECH-H004.title: onSetAnnualInterestAndReserveRatioBips Relies on Unspecified Yul Evaluation Order for returndatasize Check

TECH-H008.title: rescueTokens Lacks nonReentrant Modifier Allowing Potential Reentrancy via Malicious Token

TECH-H009.title: repay() Transfers Assets Before State Update, Allowing Interest Calculation on Newly Added Assets

TECH-H011.title: nukeFromOrbit Double _writeState Call Causes Redundant Gas Consumption and Potential State Inconsistency

TECH-H013.title: Fee-on-transfer / deflationary underlying breaks deposit/repay accounting, enabling insolvency and unfair withdrawals

TECH-H014.title: Batch query pagination functions can revert on out-of-range `start/end`, enabling read-path DoS for integrators

TECH-H015.title: Borrow hook calldata size constant typo (`RepayHook_Base_Size` used) can break borrow-hook calls if constants diverge, causing borrow DoS

TECH-H016.title: TransientBytesArray decoding can revert (panic) if transient storage is corrupted/uninitialized, potentially bricking market deployment via factory

TECH-H017.title: HooksFactory deployHooksInstance uses `extcodesize(hooksTemplate)-1` and copies code starting at byte 1, risking malformed initcode deployment for templates not matching assumed format

ECON-H002.title: closeMarket Arithmetic Underflow in availableLiquidity When scaleFactor >= 2*RAY

ECON-H003.title: closeMarket Reverts Due to Rounding Dust in scaledPendingWithdrawals

ECON-H004.title: closeMarket Loop Repeatedly Processes Same Unpaid Batch Without Progress

ECON-H005.title: onBorrow Hook Uses RepayHook_Base_Size Instead of BorrowHook_Base_Size for Calldata Sizing

ECON-H007.title: withdrawableProtocolFees Underflows When Market Is Severely Underfunded

ECON-H008.title: pushProtocolFeeBipsUpdates Reverts Entire Batch if Any Market is Closed

ECON-H009.title: Fee-on-Transfer Token Inflates Internal Accounting Leading to Market Insolvency

ECON-H011.title: createEscrow Publicly Callable - Anyone Can Deploy Escrows and Set Sanction Overrides

ECON-H012.title: Market Closure DoS via Rounding Errors in Scale Factor Conversions

ECON-H013.title: Penalty APR Evasion via Strategic Delinquency Oscillation

ECON-H014.title: Protocol Fee Update DoS via Closed Markets

ECON-H015.title: Market Insolvency via Fee-on-Transfer Token Configuration

ECON-H018.title: Gas Griefing via Unpaid Batch Processing Loop

OPS-H001.title: Assembly Evaluation Order Bug in onSetAnnualInterestAndReserveRatioBips Permanently Blocks Interest/Reserve Ratio Changes

OPS-H002.title: closeMarket Permanently Blocked by Rounding-Induced Arithmetic Underflow in Withdrawal Batch Payment

OPS-H003.title: pushProtocolFeeBipsUpdates DoS When Any Market in Range Is Closed or Already Has Target Fee

OPS-H004.title: Withdrawal Batch Accumulation Gas Griefing Prevents closeMarket Execution

OPS-H005.title: onBorrow Hook Assembly Uses Wrong Size Constant (RepayHook_Base_Size Instead of BorrowHook_Base_Size)

OPS-H006.title: withdrawableProtocolFees Arithmetic Underflow Causes collectFees Denial of Service During Extreme Delinquency

OPS-H007.title: Deposit Transfer Event Emits Input Amount Instead of Actual Minted Normalized Value

OPS-H008.title: createEscrow Unrestricted Caller Can Grief tmpEscrowParams in Concurrent Transaction Contexts

OPS-H009.title: closeMarket Loop Repeatedly Processes Same First Unpaid Batch Without Progressing Queue

OPS-H010.title: Division-by-zero / panic in executeWithdrawal() for non-existent or empty withdrawal batches (publicly triggerable DoS)

OPS-H011.title: Hook callback size bug in HooksConfig.onBorrow may break borrow() hook behavior and enable unintended borrow execution (or permanent borrow DoS) depending on hook implementation

OPS-H012.title: executeWithdrawals batch call can be griefed by a single failing withdrawal entry (all-or-nothing aggregation DoS)

OPS-H013.title: Approval race/allowance front-running-style issue in approve() (ERC20 allowance change hazard) can be operationally exploited without mempool (via multi-tx sequencing)

TECH2-H001.title: Dust Donation Inflates Unclaimed Withdrawals Leading to Insolvency and DoS

TECH2-H002.title: Unbounded Loop in closeMarket Causes Out-of-Gas DoS

TECH2-H004.title: Chainalysis Oracle DoS Blocks All Market Operations

TECH2-H005.title: approve() + nonstandard allowance semantics may enable griefing via reentrancy guard interaction with hooks-driven workflows

TECH2-H006.title: TransientBytesArray decoding may revert due to malformed transient storage encoding, bricking market deployment paths that rely on it

TECH2-H007.title: HooksFactory template deployment via extcodecopy(sub(extcodesize(template),1)) can deploy malformed initcode or omit first byte, enabling template-induced deployment faults

TECH2-H008.title: WildcatSanctionsSentinel overrideSanction/removeSanctionOverride are permissionless per-borrower key, potentially enabling sanctioned-escrow bypass if markets rely on msg.sender as borrower identity

ECON2-H001.title: Permanent Market Closure DoS via Rounding Underflow in `_applyWithdrawalBatchPayment`

ECON2-H002.title: Block Gas Limit DoS on `closeMarket` via Unpaid Batches Bloat

ECON2-H003.title: Protocol Fee Update DoS via Single Closed Market

ECON2-H004.title: Gas Wasting Loop in `closeMarket` for Partially Paid Batches

ECON2-H005.title: Market Insolvency with Fee-on-Transfer Underlying Assets

ECON2-H006.title: Potential Permanent DoS on Market Parameter Updates due to Yul Evaluation Order

ECON2-H007.title: Protocol Fee Collection Panic during Market Insolvency

ECON2-H008.title: executeWithdrawals Strips Hook ExtraData, Bypassing Hook Access Control

ECON2-H011.title: Pro-Rata Withdrawal Rounding Dust Permanently Locks Funds in normalizedUnclaimedWithdrawals

ECON2-H012.title: queueWithdrawal Passes Raw User Amount to Hooks Instead of Normalized Scaled Value

ECON2-H013.title: Hooks onCreateMarket Can Disable Optional Hooks During Market Deployment

ECON2-H014.title: writeState Delinquency Check Creates Stale isDelinquent When Multiple Asset Transfers Occur

OPS2-H001.title: Market Closure Blocked by Arithmetic Underflow from Rounding Dust

OPS2-H002.title: Massive Fake Transfer Event Spoofing via Ray Math Overflow

OPS2-H003.title: Block Gas Limit DoS on Market Closure via Unpaid Batch Spam

OPS2-H004.title: Batch Protocol Fee Updates Blocked by Single Closed Market

OPS2-H005.title: Keeper Automation Breakage via Reverting Debt Repayment

OPS2-H006.title: Systemic Insolvency via Fee-on-Transfer Token Accounting Discrepancy

OPS2-H007.title: Protocol Fee Collection Panic via Unclaimed Withdrawals Underflow

OPS2-H008.title: Sanctioned Funds Permanently Trapped if Sentinel Oracle Dependency Fails

OPS2-H009.title: Anyone can hard-freeze a market by forcing a revert in nukeFromOrbit() via internal _getAccount() sanctions check

OPS2-H010.title: Market-token approval/transferFrom can be used to grief integrators by consuming allowance for value that is not actually moved (rounding loss), enabling denial of withdrawals via allowance exhaustion

OPS2-H011.title: Permissionless updateState() can be used to amplify hook-induced reverts and stall market progress

OPS2-H012.title: Borrower can unintentionally lock fee collection by triggering withdrawableProtocolFees underflow via non-standard asset behavior

OPS2-H013.title: Origination fee payment in deployMarket can be abused with malicious ERC20 to lock borrower deployments (reverting transfers)

OPS2-H014.title: Transient storage parameter passing may fail on chains/EVM configs without stable tstore/tload semantics, bricking market deployments
